# Master Action Plan — Schengen Visa *(template)*

**Copy to:** `docs/05-master-action-plan.md`
**Current date:** {{TODAY}}
**Application channel:** {{TLScontact_/_VFS}} {{CITY}}
**Target submission:** {{TARGET_WEEK}}
**Travel window:** {{TRAVEL_START}} – {{TRAVEL_END}}

> Keep this file PII-free. Document numbers, bank figures, passport scans
> belong in the deny-listed `forms/`, `appointments/`, `insurance/` folders.

---

## Timeline overview

| Week | Phase | Outcome |
|---|---|---|
| T−6 | Research & alignment | Country choice locked, family profile drafted |
| T−5 | Documents gathering | All evidence requested (employer, school, bank) |
| T−4 | Application form | France-Visas / portal account, form completed |
| T−3 | Booking | TLScontact / VFS appointment booked |
| T−2 | Documents finalisation | Cover letters drafted, insurance bought, itinerary locked |
| T−1 | Pre-appointment review | Full doc pack printed + dry-run checklist |
| T−0 | Appointment | Biometrics, document submission, fee paid |
| T+1 | Decision wait | Status polling, prepare for travel |

## Week-by-week tasks

### Week T−6 — Research & alignment
- [ ] Decide main destination and trip pattern
- [ ] Confirm consulate jurisdiction for your UK address
- [ ] Decide submission channel (TLScontact / VFS / consulate)
- [ ] Draft `docs/00-family-profile.md`

### Week T−5 — Documents
- [ ] Request employer letter (template: `forms/email-hr-employer-letter-request.md`)
- [ ] Request school enrolment letter (if applicable)
- [ ] Pull 3-6 months bank statements
- [ ] Order certified translations if your originals aren't in English/French

### Week T−4 — Application form
- [ ] Create one portal account per applicant
- [ ] Fill the short-stay (Type C) tourism form
- [ ] Print the receipt — barcode is what you bring to the appointment

### Week T−3 — Booking
- [ ] Create the TLScontact / VFS account
- [ ] Book appointment slots (use the `Visa Master` Chrome extension to watch for openings)

### Week T−2 — Document finalisation
- [ ] Buy travel insurance ({{MIN_COVER}})
- [ ] Lock the itinerary in `docs/06-itinerary-locked.md`
- [ ] Draft cover letters from `forms/cover-letter-template-*.md`
- [ ] Refundable hotel + flight reservations

### Week T−1 — Review
- [ ] Cross-check against `docs/02-document-checklist.md` (yours)
- [ ] Print everything, single-sided, in the order the checklist defines
- [ ] Dry-run the journey to the appointment centre

### Week T−0 — Appointment
- [ ] Biometrics (10-finger scan + photo)
- [ ] Submit document pack
- [ ] Pay fee + service charge
- [ ] Keep the receipt

### Week T+1 — Decision
- [ ] Poll status daily
- [ ] Pre-pack travel docs
- [ ] On approval: pay non-refundable balances, finalise bookings
